text.string: Across the busy picnic scene, <|object_ref_start|>the blue backpack<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(020,020),(140,180)<|box_end|> rests near the edge, <|object_ref_start|>the white plate<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(220,030),(340,180)<|box_end|> sits a bit farther right, <|object_ref_start|>the striped umbrella<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(420,040),(560,220)<|box_end|> rises above the table, <|object_ref_start|>the wooden chair<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(040,250),(180,410)<|box_end|> stands below the bag, <|object_ref_start|>the silver kettle<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(260,260),(420,420)<|box_end|> reflects the light near the center, and <|object_ref_start|>the yellow bowl<|object_ref_end|><|box_start|>(470,250),(620,420)<|box_end|> stays on the right side of the setup while the narration continues naturally about shadows, food, and the afternoon sun.
